mapper.select: select GRP_IDX from TB_PUMP_INF GROUP BY GRP_IDX

select pump.GRP_IDX, pump.GRP_NM, pump.PUMP_IDX, pump.MOTOR_ID, GROUP_CONCAT(cn.CHANNEL_ID) CHANNEL_ID, GROUP_CONCAT(cn.CHANNEL_NM) CHANNEL_NM from TB_PUMP_INF pump, TB_CHANNEL cn where pump.MOTOR_ID = cn.MOTOR_ID and pump.GRP_IDX = #{grp_idx} group by pump.MOTOR_ID ORDER BY pump.GRP_IDX, pump.PUMP_IDX, cn.CHANNEL_NO ASC

select rms.MOTOR_ID, rms.CHANNEL_ID, cn.CHANNEL_NM, rms.RMS, DATE_FORMAT(rms.ACQ_DATE, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s") as "ACQ_DATE" from TB_RMS rms, TB_CHANNEL cn WHERE rms.MOTOR_ID = cn.MOTOR_ID and cn.CHANNEL_ID = rms.CHANNEL_ID and rms.ACQ_DATE >= #{startDate} AND rms.ACQ_DATE <= DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) and rms.MOTOR_ID = #{motor_id} and cn.CHANNEL_NM = #{channel_nm}

select tw.MOTOR_ID, tw.CHANNEL_ID, DATE_FORMAT(tw.ACQ_DATE, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s") as "ACQ_DATE", tw.DATA_ARRAY from TB_TIMEWAVE tw, TB_CHANNEL cn where tw.ACQ_DATE = #{acq_date} and tw.MOTOR_ID = #{motor_id} and cn.CHANNEL_NM = #{channel_nm} and tw.CHANNEL_ID = cn.CHANNEL_ID

select sp.MOTOR_ID, sp.CHANNEL_ID, DATE_FORMAT(sp.ACQ_DATE, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s") as "ACQ_DATE", sp.DATA_ARRAY from TB_SPECTRUM sp, TB_CHANNEL cn where sp.ACQ_DATE = #{acq_date} and sp.MOTOR_ID = #{motor_id} and cn.CHANNEL_NM = #{channel_nm} and sp.CHANNEL_ID = cn.CHANNEL_ID

select freq.MOTOR_ID, freq.CHANNEL_ID, DATE_FORMAT(freq.ACQ_DATE, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s") as "ACQ_DATE", freq.FREQ_TYPE, freq.FREQ_VALUE from TB_FREQ freq, TB_CHANNEL cn where freq.ACQ_DATE = #{acq_date} and freq.MOTOR_ID = #{motor_id} and cn.CHANNEL_NM = #{channel_nm} and freq.CHANNEL_ID = cn.CHANNEL_ID

select st.GRP_ID, pump.GRP_NM, st.MOTOR_ID, st.EQ_TYPE, st.CHANNEL_NM, st.PARM_NM, st.PARM_VALUE from TB_AL_SETTING st, TB_PUMP_INF pump where st.GRP_ID = pump.GRP_IDX GROUP BY st.GRP_ID, st.MOTOR_ID, st.CHANNEL_NM, st.PARM_NM
